name: afo-cloudflare-api-mcp
purpose: Schema-clean read-only Cloudflare verifier surface with complete outputSchema descriptors, read-only annotations, and narrow-tool-first ordering. Provides status, read-only Worker settings inspection, bound-D1 resolution, D1 schema preflight, D1 table inventory, inverse-agent verification, cached Cloudflare docs search/excerpts, and an advanced Cloud-Loop verifier fallback. The default connector surface intentionally omits generic endpoint callers, admin writes, deploy tools, D1 write/DDL execution, skill mutation, and spec refresh tools so fresh chats see only read-only verifier capabilities.
